_note: Curated point markers for regions/peoples OpenHistoricalMap leaves blank. Label-only (no borders); clickable to start a lesson. Two enrichment modes: (a) `qid` = precise Wikidata enrichment via the endpoint; (b) `article_url` (+ optional `summary`, `inception`, `dissolution`) = a curated external article (e.g. worldhistory.org), rendered directly with no server call. decdate = numeric year, negative for BCE.

properties.name: Eastern Han
properties.summary: The Eastern (Later) Han dynasty (25–220 CE) restored Han rule from a new capital at Luoyang after the Xin interregnum, presiding over advances in technology and the spread of Buddhism before fragmenting into the Three Kingdoms.
